query:
SELECT ec.name as category, COUNT(*) as records, SUM(e.amount) as total
FROM expenses e
JOIN expense_categories ec ON e.categoryId = ec.id
WHERE e.deletedAt IS NULL
GROUP BY ec.name ORDER BY total DESC;
